channel.title: Mike's Daily Brief
channel.description: A personalized daily news brief covering local Boston/Somerville news, national headlines, markets, GTM trends, and the Boston startup community.
channel.itunes:author: Concivi Growth

item.title: Morning Brief — Wednesday, June 24, 2026
item.description: Your daily brief covering Somerville and Greater Boston local news, national headlines, international stories, markets, GTM trends, and the Boston startup community.
